creator: jsa.bsd@gmail.com
text:
I cannot duplicate this problem.

I have three machines with FreeBSD+VLC, and all machines have the proper 
DEPORIGIN for gettext.

pazuzu% grep gettext /var/db/pkg/vlc-1.0.6,3/+CONTENTS
@pkgdep gettext-0.17_1
@comment DEPORIGIN:devel/gettext

I pulled a package from the build cluster and checked its +CONTENTS file. It has 
the proper DEPORIGIN as well.

What options or knobs are you using to build the port? Gettext should be 
controlled by the NLS knob.
